data.title: A whale deposited $5.59 million in ENA into Binance, which may result in a loss of $3.21 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale unlocked and deposited 14.83 million ENA worth $5.59 million into Binance. Previously, the whale withdrew 22.63 million ENA (worth $11.84 million) from Binance and Bybit, and obtained 577,000 ENA through staking. However, even so, the whale still faces a loss of $3.21 million. Currently, the whale still holds 3 million ENA, worth about $1.12 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidation on Major Exchanges
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin falls below $101,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) will reach $996 million. Conversely, if Bitcoin surpasses $103,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on these exchanges will amount to $247 million.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not precisely display the number of contracts pending liquidation or the exact value of contracts being liquidated. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the extent to which the target price reaching a certain level will be affected. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests that once the price reaches that level, there will be a stronger reaction due to a wave of liquidity.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin is expected to rise to $1 million by 2028, but there may be tactical shorting opportunities in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes said in a newly published article that he has re-added cryptocurrencies at market lows and believes that now is a good time to pick high-quality altcoins that can outperform Bitcoin in a bull market. He is particularly optimistic about two projects: $PENDLE and $ETHFI. The return of foreign capital and the massive depreciation of U.S. debt will be the two major catalysts that drive Bitcoin to $1 million by 2028. He mentioned that the 2028 U.S. presidential election may bring policy uncertainty, but now is a critical period for Bitcoin to benefit. Although he believes that Bitcoin will rise to $1 million, there are still opportunities for short-term tactical shorting. He pointed out that capital controls and currency printing are coming, but the road ahead is full of uncertainty. The Trump team is not consistent on capital controls, so there may be different policy directions.

data.title: Market Trends Shift as Funding Rates Indicate Bearish Sentiment
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges are indicating a shift from neutral to bearish sentiment in the market. The funding rates for key cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying data.

Funding rates are a mechanism used by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain the balance between contract prices and the prices of the underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the trading platform collecting this fee. It serves to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring that contract prices remain close to the underlying asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% is considered the baseline rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it indicates a generally bullish market sentiment. Conversely, when the funding rate falls below 0.005%, it suggests a bearish market outlook.

data.title: Bitcoin Volatility Declines to February Levels, Market Stabilizes
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent data from Coinglass indicates that Bitcoin's volatility has decreased to 1.85%, reaching levels last seen at the end of February this year. This trend suggests a gradual slowdown in the overall downward movement.

High volatility in Bitcoin is often associated with speculative trading and retail investor FOMO (fear of missing out). A decrease in volatility may imply a reduction in short-term speculative activity, signaling a period of market consolidation or calm. Additionally, Bitcoin's price fluctuations are frequently linked to macroeconomic events such as inflation expectations, interest rate changes, or geopolitical risks. When these external factors stabilize, Bitcoin's volatility tends to decrease accordingly.

data.title: Binance Finance, one-click coin purchase, flash exchange, leveraged listing of Nexpace (NXPC)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance announced that it will launch Nexpace (NXPC) on multiple platforms on May 15, providing more abundant trading options. The NXPC principal-guaranteed coin-earning current product will be launched on the Binance principal-guaranteed coin-earning platform and open for subscription at 15:30 Beijing time on the 15th.
At the same time, NXPC will support fee-free exchange with tokens such as BTC and USDT on the flash exchange trading platform. Coin safe warehouse and position-by-position leverage will also add NXPC as a borrowable asset at 15:50 on the 15th, and open NXPC/USDT and NXPC/USDC leverage trading pairs.

data.title: NXPC has been listed on Gate.io, with a growth rate of up to 1375%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that NXPC was launched on Gate.io at 14:00 (UTC+8) today, and the increase after the launch reached 1375%. At the same time, NXPC has been simultaneously launched on Gate.io Launchpool, with an estimated annualized return of 730%; in addition, NXPC has been launched on Gate.io CandyDrop, and the NXPC airdrop event will be launched from 14:00 on May 15 to 23:59 on May 29 (UTC+8). Users who participate in spot trading, contract trading and invite friends can share 500,000 NXPC airdrop prize pools, worth more than 1.4 million US dollars.
Previously, Gate.io launched the NXPC HODLer Airdrop, and users holding 1 GT can participate in the airdrop for free, with a total reward of 300,000 NXPC tokens.
